name: Rime Foil
description:
The steely blue blade of this +2 striking frost rapier emerges from a hilt wrapped in thick leather and trimmed in fur to protect the wielder's hand.

Activate 2 (concentrate, manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Requirements You hit a creature using the rime foil as your last action

Effect You cast 5th-rank on the target ( to disbelieve). If the target has been damaged by a shattered plan in the last round, the DC is instead .

Special The rime foil pairs with the .
